mapper.sql: select a.spuuid,a.rkrq,a.ybtse,a.skssqq,a.skssqz, a.DJXH, DEPT_ID, SHXYDM, NSRMC,JCGHZH, JCGHHM, JCGHHH, B.ZHPCID, b.zt,b.BZ, b.CREATE_TIME, b.CREATE_BY , b.UPDATE_TIME,b.UPDATE_BY from gh_jf a left join gh_hkxx_bfzhpc b on b.spuuid=a.spuuid
mapper.select: select a.spuuid,a.rkrq,a.ybtse,a.skssqq,a.skssqz,a.DEPT_ID, a.djxh, a.shxydm, a.nsrmc,JCGHZH, JCGHHM, JCGHHH, B.ZHPCID, b.DJXH as sub_DJXH, b.ZH , b.HM , b.HH , b.ZT , b.CREATE_BY , b.CREATE_TIME, b.UPDATE_BY, b.UPDATE_TIME from gh_jf a left join gh_hkxx_bfzhpc b on a.spuuid=b.spuuid where a.SPUUID = #{spuuid}

SELECT a.spuuid, a.rkrq, a.ybtse, a.skssqq, a.skssqz, a.DEPT_ID, a.djxh, a.shxydm, a.nsrmc, a.JCGHZH, a.JCGHHM, a.JCGHHH, c.JCGHYH, b.ZHPCID, b.DJXH as sub_DJXH, b.ZH, b.HM, b.HH, b.ZT, b.CREATE_BY, b.CREATE_TIME, b.UPDATE_BY, b.UPDATE_TIME FROM gh_jf a LEFT JOIN gh_hkxx_bfzhpc b ON a.spuuid = b.spuuid LEFT JOIN bfzhpc c ON c.djxh = a.djxh WHERE a.SPUUID = #{spuuid}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO gh_hkxx_bfzhpc( ZHPCID, SPUUID, DJXH, ZH, HM, HH, ZT, BZ, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME ) VALUES
( #{item.zhpcid}, #{item.spuuid}, #{item.djxh}, #{item.zh}, #{item.hm}, #{item.hh}, #{item.zt}, #{item.bz}, #{item.createBy}, NOW(), #{item.updateBy}, NOW() )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ZHPCID = VALUES(zhpcid), SPUUID = VALUES(spuuid), DJXH = VALUES(djxh), ZH = VALUES(zh), HM = VALUES(hm), HH = VALUES(hh), ZT = VALUES(zt), BZ = VALUES(bz), UPDATE_BY = VALUES(update_by), UPDATE_TIME = VALUES(update_time)
